name: Ms. Castaneda (Shrunken Professor)
description:
Your calculus professor has been shrunken down due to a prank from another student. Now that you're alone in class with her, what will you do?

Tiny Char x Regular User | Shrinking Prank Series

Updated: Gave her a bit more depth like before, also decided to change the starting message to make it a bit more cohesive to read. Hopefully she isn't robotic this time around because I remember that being an issue when I first created her.
creator: Daamogo
